name: get_hospitals_by_affordability
description: Find hospitals within an affordability score range. Affordability score ranges from 0.0 (most expensive) to 1.0 (most affordable). Use this when users ask for affordable, cheap, budget-friendly, or economical hospitals. Returns hospitals with ratings, costs, and insurance information.

min_affordability.description: Minimum affordability score. Use 0.7 for 'very affordable', 0.6 for 'affordable', 0.5 for 'moderate'. Range: 0.0 to 1.0

max_affordability.description: Maximum affordability score. Typically set to 1.0 to include all hospitals above the minimum threshold. Range: 0.0 to 1.0
